subject: [DMAAP-DR] Bump DR image versions to 2.1.7
commit_message:
[DMAAP-DR] Bump DR image versions to 2.1.7

Change-Id: Ibf553a60b9d80eaa6ecc7d3d74a7626182ea3a7e
Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1492
